conditions: Several accounts share a durable governance or operational requirement.
decision_context: Use the shallowest structure that distributes required controls coherently.
exclusions: Do not mirror reporting lines by default or assume one OU tree fits every organization.

decision_criterion: Minimize hierarchy and operational overhead while preserving every required policy, compliance, environment, and ownership boundary.

source_references.locator: Design principles > Organize based on security and operational needs; Avoid deep OU hierarchies
source_references.supported_proposition: OU structure should align controls while avoiding unnecessary depth.

statement: Group accounts into OUs by shared function, environment, compliance, or control needs, and add hierarchy only when an additional policy or operational boundary justifies it.
